'''''Star Wars: Boba Fett: Death, Lies, & Treachery''''' is a [[Star Wars comic books|trade paperback book]] which collects three one-shots from [[Dark Horse Comics]]' [[Star Wars: Boba Fett (comic series)|''Star Wars: Boba Fett'' series]].

{{Comics-stub}}

==Publisher's summary==
''[[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] pursues an [[Wim Magwit|intergalactic magician]] who may hold the key to the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]]' future. The fact that the magician has died only poses a slight problem for the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]]… not even the dead can escape Boba Fett!''

==Contents==
*''[[Boba Fett: Bounty on Bar-Kooda]]''
*''[[Boba Fett: When the Fat Lady Swings]]''
*''[[Boba Fett: Murder Most Foul]]''
